chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2104 of 2024 Sigma Pharma International (Pvt.) Ltd. Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 08.08.2024 Mr. Rashid Mureed for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel has been instructed not to press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. Chief Justice Judge
